# GitHub Pages

This site is served via GitHub Pages on the `main` branch from `/`.

To enable locally with `gh`:

```
gh repo edit --enable-pages --pages-source-branch main --pages-source-path /
```

To enable in the browser: Settings &rarr; Pages &rarr; Build and deployment &rarr; Source:
"Deploy from a branch" &rarr; Branch: `main` &rarr; Folder: `/`.
